profile.name: Ranieri Althoff
profile.tagline: Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience in scalable web development, secure systems, and cross-functional collaboration. Passionate about impactful software and open source.

about: I'm a software engineer based in Stockholm, currently building internationalized experiences at Volvo Cars. I care about thoughtful interfaces, healthy developer experience, and software that respects the people using it. My background spans front-end product work, low-level systems, and applied cryptography.

bullets: Developed and maintained an internationalized B2B portal with dynamic content per market.
Built internal tooling, automated dependency management and patched vulnerabilities.
Streamlined CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions), reducing friction across teams.
Standardized processes to reduce maintenance overhead and improve focus on product delivery.
Contributed to new product features within Klarna's app ecosystem.
Built scalable services with responsive front ends using React Native and Node.js.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and automated testing for high quality and reliability.
Led product development from concept to production for first-line clients.
Developed modular front-end applications and high-performance back-end systems.
Designed and optimized algorithms tailored to client-specific needs.
Implemented web scraping solutions to collect data from sources without official APIs.
Worked on real-time software for embedded systems in telecom hardware.
Contributed to task scheduling, resource management, and hardware integration.
Developed security libraries using hashing, encryption, and public key infrastructure.
Supported research in secure communication and digital certification.

education.detail: Thesis: implementation of a secure remote voting system.
